name: Burgundersosse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the sugar over low flame until lightly caramelized.
2. Stir in the red burgundy and scallions. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In another saucepan, melt the butter over medium flame. Whisk in flour and cook until golden.
5. Gradually whisk in the onion mixture and remaining wine.
6. Add meat extract, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and sugar. Mix well.
7. Serve with beef and enjoy hot.
